text.paragraph: Lab Status: HbA1c was ordered during this encounter. Laboratory report has not been received. Result is pending - follow-up with laboratory required.
HEDIS MY2025 measures addressed in this document per NCQA value sets:

list.item: PCE: Potentially Harmful Drug-Disease Interactions - Compliant MY2025
CBP: Controlling High Blood Pressure - Compliant MY2025
CCS: Cervical Cancer Screening - Compliant MY2025
KED: Kidney Health Evaluation Diabetes - Compliant MY2025
OHD: Osteoporosis Management in Women - Compliant MY2025
AMR: Asthma Medication Ratio - Compliant MY2025
EED: Eye Exam for Patients with Diabetes - Compliant MY2025
HBD: HbA1c Control for Diabetes - Compliant MY2025
MRP: Medication Reconciliation Post-Discharge - Compliant MY2025
CDC: Comprehensive Diabetes Care - Compliant MY2025
PPC: Prenatal and Postpartum Care - Compliant MY2025
DAE: Drug Interactions in Older Adults - Compliant MY2025
AWC: Adolescent Well-Care Visit - Compliant MY2025
BCS: Breast Cancer Screening - Compliant MY2025
SPC: Statin Therapy for Cardiovascular Disease - Compliant MY2025
FUH: Follow-Up After Mental Illness Hospitalization - Compliant MY2025
IMA: Immunizations for Adolescents - Compliant MY2025
ADD: ADHD Medication Management - Compliant MY2025
COA: Care for Older Adults - Compliant MY2025
W34: Well-Child Visits - Compliant MY2025
COL: Colorectal Cancer Screening - Compliant MY2025
